title: HarpyModLoader
description: Library to load custom roles for The Last Voyage Of The Harpy Express.
body:
# HarpyModLoader
Modded role loader for [The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express](https://modrinth.com/modpack/harpy-express) created by [doctor4t](https://www.youtube.com/@doctor4t).

For developers, Please read about the mod on it's [github repository.](https://github.com/agmass/HarpyModLoader)

## Config

This mod includes a config to ban roles, alongside */listRoles* and */setEnabledRole* to list and change their ban status.


## Special Thanks

- huanmeng-qwq for code refactoring
- Pixiu_Baijie and Qlickly_ for the Chinese translation

The only reason Claude is listed as a contributor is because of some chungus that used AI to fix a bug and i PR'd it on accident. Fuck AI.
